MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Andrew Lambert is present.
Attorney Susan Parkinson appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Terry Trice is present.
Attorney Misti Schmidt representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Jim Weixel, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-7-2011 is vacated.
